# vercel_blob_store (Data Source)

Provides information about an existing Vercel Blob store.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "vercel_blob_store" "example" {
  name = "example-blob-store"
}

data "vercel_blob_store" "example" {
  id = vercel_blob_store.example.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The ID of the Blob store.

### Optional

- `team_id` (String) The ID of the team that owns the Blob store. Required when configuring a team resource if a default team has not been set in the provider.

### Read-Only

- `access` (String) Whether blobs created in this store are `public` or `private` by default.
- `created_at` (Number) The Unix timestamp, in milliseconds, when the Blob store was created.
- `file_count` (Number) The number of files currently stored in the Blob store.
- `name` (String) The name of the Blob store.
- `region` (String) The region in which the Blob store exists.
- `size` (Number) The size of the Blob store in bytes.
- `status` (String) The current status of the Blob store.
- `updated_at` (Number) The Unix timestamp, in milliseconds, when the Blob store was last updated.
